basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhubaneswar Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar (IIT Bhubaneswar) Adjunct Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Bhubaneswar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 for the post of Adjunct Faculty.

qualification.education_qualification: M.P.Ed and Ph.D in Physical Education and Sports (Specialization in Physical Education Pedagogy/Sports Psychology)
qualification.details: Adjunct Faculty: M.P.Ed and Ph.D in Physical Education and Sports (Specialization in Physical Education Pedagogy/Sports Psychology). Her/his association must add value to the academic programme/students.

salary_details.pay_scale: Honorarium of Rs. 3,000/- per lecture hour, maximum ceiling of Rs. 1,20,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Honorarium of Rs. 3,000/- per lecture hour, maximum ceiling of Rs. 1,20,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Bhubaneswar Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Bhubaneswar Adjunct Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Adjunct Faculty position at IIT Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Adjunct Faculty position at IIT Bhubaneswar is 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Adjunct Faculty role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.P.Ed and a Ph.D. in Physical Education and Sports, with a specialization in Physical Education Pedagogy or Sports Psychology.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Adjunct Faculty position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a seminar presentation and an interaction session with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply via email to the Head, School of Humanities, Social Sciences & Management.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Adjunct Faculty at IIT Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: An honorarium of Rs. 3,000/- per lecture hour is offered, with a maximum monthly ceiling of Rs. 1,20,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any specific experience required for the Adjunct Faculty position?
faq.answer: Yes, the candidate's association should add value to the academic program and students of the institute.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Adjunct Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Adjunct Faculty position at IIT Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: IIT Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through any other mode apart from email?
faq.answer: No, the application mode specified in the notification is strictly via email.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Adjunct Faculty position?
faq.answer: The Adjunct Faculty position is on a contract basis.
